title: Algerian Tagine with Potatoes
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from North Africa, made with tender potatoes and spices, cooked in a traditional clay pot with a conical lid.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a traditional clay or cast-iron tagine over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the potato, Algerian spice blend, and chicken broth. Stir to combine.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
